column3: "Corydalis reduces stress and anxiety" refers to its capability to provide relief from mental pressures like tension and emotional uneasiness.
"Corydalis improves sleep quality" refers to its ability to enhance the overall experience of resting, leading to a better quality sleep and feeling more rested when awakening.
"Corydalis alleviates pain and inflammation" refers to its ability to reduce discomfort and swelling caused by various medical conditions.
"Corydalis boosts mood and emotional well-being" refers to its ability to enhance mental happiness, relieve stress, and support a better sense of emotional balance.
"Corydalis protects against oxidative stress" refers to its ability to shield cells from damage caused by harmful free radicals.
"Corydalis promotes bone health" refers to its ability to boost or maintain strong bones through certain beneficial substances it contains.
"Corydalis supports cardiovascular health" refers to its ability to help maintain a healthy heart and blood vessels, potentially lowering risks related to heart diseases.
"Corydalis enhances immune function" refers to its ability to boost and strengthen the body's defense system against illnesses or infections.
"Corydalis reduces symptoms of depression" refers to its ability to alleviate some aspects related to depression when used as a herbal remedy.

"Corydalis improves digestive health" refers to its ability to enhance the body's natural processes related to food breakdown and nutrient absorption, leading to better overall gut function and well-being.
